name: MiniMax (minimaxi.com)

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The public privacy policy located for MiniMax's international site does not state a concrete retention period. A separate MiniMax privacy policy for another product says data is deleted, destroyed, or anonymized after account deletion, expiry of the retention period, or when no longer needed for the stated purposes and no longer required by law.
dataUsage.details: The public App and Web Privacy Policy says personal information may be disclosed to subsidiaries, affiliates, contractors, service providers, and other third parties supporting the business. No primary-source API policy located during research clearly states whether API customer data is used for model training or whether an opt-out exists.

euAiAct.details: No primary-source statement about EU AI Act compliance was found. MiniMax has published a statement about complying with China's AI-generated content labeling rules, but that is not an EU AI Act commitment.

notes: MiniMax exposes public API docs and pay-per-use pricing, and its international privacy policy names Nanonoble Pte. Ltd. in Singapore as the operator. However, no public DPA/AVV, SCC commitment, sub-processor list, EU-only processing option, or clear API training policy was found in primary sources reviewed, so key GDPR-vendor due-diligence items remain undocumented publicly.
